responses: 🚆 Hello! I'm RailSathi AI. How can I assist you today?
🧹 Please provide your Train Number and Coach Number. I will help you report the cleanliness issue immediately.
💧 Water issue noted. Please share your Train Number and Coach Number so I can register your complaint.
⚡ Please share your Train Number and Coach Number. I will report the electricity issue right away.
📊 Please provide your Complaint ID to check the current status.
🚆 Please provide your Train Number so I can check the running status for you.
🎫 Please provide your PNR number to check your ticket status.
💰 Refunds are processed automatically after ticket cancellation. Please provide your PNR for detailed status.
📝 You can book tickets via IRCTC website or app. I can guide you if needed!
🍱 You can order food in train via IRCTC eCatering or authorized vendors. I can help you with that!
🚨 For emergencies, please call Railway Helpline: 139 or 182 (RPF). Stay safe!
🧳 Please report lost items immediately to RPF or call 182. You can also file a complaint.
📍 Please provide your Train Number and Station name to get platform details.
💵 Ticket fare depends on train, class, and distance. Please share route details.
🤔 Sorry, I didn't understand. You can ask about train status, complaints, PNR, booking, or railway services.
